holdings.infoBox: SKYU is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Nasdaq Cloud Computing ETF (SKYU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ISE Cloud Computing index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a modified-equally-weighted index of US companies in the cloud computing industry. SKYU was launched on Jan 19, 2021 and is issued by ProShares.
